findings.problem: The narration keeps landing emotional and structural turns with the same summative stamp ("That was ...") and companion negation-led emphasis elsewhere in the chapter. By the time the gate opens and Tovin blesses Riva by indirection, the repeated sentence shape reads as a reusable prose formula rather than a fresh pressure-specific cadence.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the turn-marking beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:267, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:281, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:303, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:373, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:493, and vary the nearby negation beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:53, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:125, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:243, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:477. Keep the same story information, but make at least four of those turns land through distinct physical consequence, image, or free-indirect thought instead of another "That was ..." or "It did not ..." construction.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if a reread of the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:53, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:125, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:167, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:243, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:267, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:281, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:303, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:373, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:477, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:493 finds no more than two turn-marking sentences still using the repeated "That was ..." or "It did not ..." formula, and each revised beat is legible through a different concrete cue on the page. FAIL if three or more of those passages still rely on the same formulaic emphasis.

summary: The chapter clears its structural obligations cleanly: all required Reed Gate beats land, continuity and tense stay intact, and the sibling voices remain sharply separated under pressure. It fails only on prose, where a repeated summative/negation sentence shape starts to flatten emphasis and makes several important turns sound mechanically stamped rather than newly observed.
